# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build Workflow
on: pull_request

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Get PR information
      uses: octokit/request-action@v1.x
      id: pr_info
      with:
        route: GET /repos/${{ github.repository }}/pulls/${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
        token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

    - name: Extract PR info
      id: extract_pr
      run: |
        PR_TITLE="${{ fromJson(steps.pr_info.outputs.data).title }}"
        PR_DESC="${{ fromJson(steps.pr_info.outputs.data).body }}"
        echo "::set-output name=pr_title::$PR_TITLE"
        echo "::set-output name=pr_desc::$PR_DESC"

    - name: Commit and push
      run: |
        git config --local user.email "action@github.com"
        git config --local user.name "GitHub Action"
        git commit -m "${{ steps.extract_pr.outputs.pr_title }}" -a

    - name: Build and Notify
      id: build
      run: |
        # Your build commands go here
        SLACK_MESSAGE="${{ steps.extract_pr.outputs.pr_title }} has been built. Description: ${{ steps.extract_pr.outputs.pr_desc }}"
        CURL_BODY='{"text":"'"$SLACK_MESSAGE"'"}'
        curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data "$CURL_BODY" ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK }}

      env:
        SLACK_WEBHOOK: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK }}
